channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LaMelo Ball misses second half of Hornets' game against Brooklyn with right ankle soreness
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LaMelo Ball missed the second half of Charlotte's 97-89 loss to the Brooklyn Nets on Monday night because of right ankle soreness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fox projects the Super Bowl averaged a record 126 million U.S. viewers
item.description: Fox Sports is projecting a Super Bowl record average audience of 126 million U.S. viewers across television and streaming platforms for Philadelphia's 40-22 victory over Kansas City on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fox projects the Super Bowl averaged a record 126 million U.S. viewers
item.description: Fox Sports is projecting a Super Bowl record average audience of 126 million U.S. viewers across television and streaming platforms for Philadelphia’s 40-22 victory over Kansas City.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles captain Lane Johnson says it will be 'team decision' to go to White House if Trump extends invite
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have won Super Bowl LIX, which begs the question: Will President Donald Trump extend an invitation to the White House after what happened in 2018?
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark gives stamp of approval to Indiana Fever's offseason moves
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Caitlin Clark stayed relatively quiet as the Indiana Fever embarked on a major offseason overhaul. Stephanie White took over as coach. Amber Cox became general manager. The construction of a new practice facility was announced.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sabathia to have Yankees logo on Hall of Fame plaque, Wagner the Astros, Suzuki the Mariners
item.description: CC Sabathia will have a New York Yankees logo on the cap of his Hall of Fame plaque and Billy Wagner will have the symbol of the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: After Super Bowl flop, the Chiefs look toward the future with massive changes on the horizon
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Even as the confetti was flying and the Philadelphia Eagles were celebrating their Super Bowl triumph on the field of the Superdome, Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs already were thinking about getting back to the big game next year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rudd, Edwards named newest NASCAR Hall of Fame inductees
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — One of the toughest drivers in NASCAR history joined one the most enigmatic drivers of the modern era as the newest inductees into the Hall of Fame in a star-studded Friday night ceremony.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl halftime performer detained after 'Gaza' flag display
item.description: A performer in Kendrick Lamar's halftime show was detained after displaying a flag with the words "Sudan" and "Gaza"
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Brewers unveil patch they will wear on their uniforms to honor Bob Uecker
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Milwaukee Brewers have unveiled a patch they will wear on their uniform this season to honor longtime broadcaster Bob Uecker, who died last month. The patch will appear on the sleeve of the Brewers’ uniforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump mocks Taylor Swift, Chiefs after she was booed during Super Bowl LIX
item.description: President Trump mocked Taylor Swift and the Chiefs after she was booed during Super Bowl LIX and he was cheered amid an embarrassing loss for Kansas City.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs fans react to team's failed 3rd consecutive Super Bowl title bid
item.description: Chiefs fans have had plenty to cheer about in recent years. But, this Super Bowl Sunday was not kind to Kansas City supporters who watched their favorite team get steamrolled.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A presidential first: Trump at the Super Bowl, latest chapter in a complicated legacy with football
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — As a student, Donald Trump played high school football. As a business baron, he owned a team in an upstart rival to the NFL and then sued the established league. As president, he denigrated pros who took a knee during the national anthem as part of a social justice movement.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Eagles Cooper DeJean scores pick-six on birthday
item.description: Eagles defensive back Cooper DeJean made an already memorable 22nd birthday even bigger during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: A major Lakers trade was rescinded. Here's why
item.description: The night before the NBA trade deadline, the Los Angeles Lakers parted ways with a young, budding star and a draft pick in exchange for a center.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Clippers dominate fourth quarter in win over Jazz
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Los Angeles Clippers broke open a close game in the fourth quarter, outscoring the Jazz 36-24, en route to a 130-110 win over Utah Saturday night. Jordan Clarkson led the Jazz with 24 points, while Keyonte George added 21 off the bench.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes offense struggles again in loss to West Virginia
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah basketball team shot just 41 percent from the field and lost its third straight road game at West Virginia Saturday, 72-61.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Football signing day recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The football program is entering a new era after 42 student-athletes officially committed to the Mavericks, officials said. “The thing I tell these guys when they go through recruiting is, ‘You’ve got to be where your feet are.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: McCallum wins all-around as Red Rocks beat Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Grace McCallum won the all-around with a score of 39.65 to lead the 4th-ranked Utah gymnastics team past #19 Arizona, 197.675 to 196.125.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Martinez scores 30 as USU beats Fresno State, 89-81
item.description: FRESNO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Ian Martinez scored 30 points and led Utah State to an 89-81 victory over Fresno State Friday night. Martinez, who made 10 of 14 shots from the field, tied a career high with eight rebounds for the Aggies (21-3, 11-2 Mountain West Conference).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Chiefs, Eagles players with ties to San Diego area
item.description: Super Bowl Sunday is sure to be a fun one as the Philadelphia Eagles and Kansas City Chiefs battle it out for the Vince Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe were voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dylan Guenther scores game-winner in OT again
item.description: COLUMBUS (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther has proven to have a penchant for the dramatic. For the second straight game, Utah's leading scorer found the back of the net in the final minute of overtime to give UHC a 3-2 win over Columbus Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz acquire guard KJ Martin at trade deadline
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a busy trade deadline for the Utah Jazz, but when all the dust settled, the Jazz are coming away with one new player and five draft picks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NCAA changes participation policy on transgender athletes
item.description: The NCAA has changed its participation policy for athletes, keeping transgender students from women's sports
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: McDavid makes perfect pass in overtime as the Oilers beat the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor McDavid set up Zach Hyman in overtime, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Wednesday night. Hyman redirected McDavid's pass for the power-play goal at 1:36. It was Hyman's 19th goal and McDavid's 49th assist of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Edwards scores 49 to lead Wolves over short-handed Bulls 127-108
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Anthony Edwards scored 49 points, including 20 in the third quarter, as the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the short-handed Chicago Bulls 127-108 on Wednesday night. Edwards hit six 3-pointers and was 17 of 18 from the free-throw line and also added nine rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Settlement creates $5 million fund for NWSL players after abuse scandal
item.description: The National Women's Soccer League will establish a $5 million fund for players as part of a settlement that stemmed from allegations of emotional and sexual misconduct that rocked the league in 2021. Attorneys general from Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Matt Nagy offers advice for Ben Johnson, prepares for 2nd matchup against Vic Fangio in the Big Game
item.description: Matt Nagy, Kansas City Chiefs offensive coordinator, shared advice for the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, emphasizing the importance of winning and beating the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
